landing.heroTitle: Care that travels with your family
landing.heroSubtitle: Petit Stay connects luxury hotels with vetted childcare specialists, so you can enjoy your stay while your little ones are in trusted hands.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every detail is crafted to give parents confidence and children joy during hotel stays.
landing.feature1Desc: Premium in-room childcare chosen by 5-star hotels. Vetted specialists care for your children safely in the comfort of your hotel room.
landing.feature2Desc: Background-checked, professionally trained specialists with our Gold/Silver tier system ensure the highest standard of childcare.
landing.feature3Desc: Activity logs, photo updates, and real-time chat let you check on your child from anywhere during your evening out.
landing.step1Desc: Browse our network of premium partner hotels and select the perfect location for your stay.
landing.step2Desc: Choose a certified childcare specialist, pick your time, and complete our Trust Protocol check-in.
landing.step3Desc: Relax knowing your children are in expert hands with real-time updates and 24/7 support.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Petit Stay transformed our hotel experience. The sitter was incredible with our kids, and the live updates gave us complete peace of mind during dinner.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The Trust Protocol check-in made us feel so secure. We could see every activity in real-time. It's the gold standard in hotel childcare.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Since partnering with Petit Stay, our guest satisfaction scores for families have increased by 40%. It's become our most requested service.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to elevate your family's hotel experience?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of premium hotels and thousands of families who trust Petit Stay for exceptional childcare.
landing.footerTagline: Premium hotel childcare infrastructure for the world's best hospitality brands.
landing.footerCopyright: Tokyo · Seoul · Singapore. All rights reserved.

about.title: About Petit Stay
about.subtitle: Premium in-hotel childcare, reimagined.
about.missionDesc: Petit Stay is the B2B2C platform for in-hotel childcare. Hotels are the primary touchpoint — we handle specialist matching, real-time operations, payment settlement, and liability insurance behind the scenes. For traveling families, the experience is seamless: book through the hotel concierge or our app, and a vetted specialist arrives at your door. For hotels, it is a premium amenity that drives guest loyalty and ancillary revenue without operational burden.
about.howWeWorkDesc: Hotels partner with Petit Stay to offer on-demand babysitting through our concierge platform. Guest families book through the hotel front desk or directly via our app. Every specialist is background-checked, first-aid certified, and trained in hospitality service standards. Our platform handles the entire workflow — from booking and identity verification to real-time monitoring, payment settlement, and post-session feedback.
about.bullet1: Real-time session monitoring with activity logs and photo updates
about.bullet2: QR-based secure check-in, identity verification, and handoff protocol
about.bullet4: Comprehensive liability coverage on every booking (up to ₩100M per incident)
about.whereDesc: Currently based in Seoul, with Tokyo expansion in preparation. We target five-star hotels in both cities, starting with premium properties in Gangnam, Jongno, and Yeouido.
about.teamDesc: Founded in 2025 by an entrepreneur with hands-on experience in franchise operations, hospitality management, and software development. With a background spanning restaurant business growth, Java/Spring Boot engineering, and frontend development (React, TypeScript, Firebase), the founder brings operational expertise and technical capability to solve real problems in the hospitality industry.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Help us redefine family hospitality.
careers.whyDesc: We are an early-stage startup solving a real gap in the hospitality industry. You will work directly with the founder, ship features that reach hotel guests and childcare professionals, and shape the product from the ground up. If you care about safety, hospitality, and building something meaningful, we would love to hear from you.
careers.job1Desc: Build and maintain our React/TypeScript/Firebase platform — real-time session monitoring, booking flows, and hotel console. Remote (Asia-Pacific timezone). Experience with Firestore, Cloud Functions, and responsive design required.
careers.job2Desc: Build our hotel partner network from scratch. Identify target properties, lead pitch meetings, negotiate partnership terms, and manage ongoing relationships with hotel operations teams in Seoul.
careers.job3Desc: Recruit, screen, and train childcare specialists for the Korean market. Manage background checks, first-aid certification verification, hospitality training programs, and ongoing quality assurance.
careers.job4Desc: Design trust-centered UX for three distinct user groups — parents who need reassurance, specialists who need efficient workflows, and hotel staff who need operational clarity. Remote (Asia-Pacific timezone).
careers.benefit1: Stock options — early-stage equity for all full-time team members
careers.benefit2: Flexible remote work with quarterly team gatherings in Seoul
careers.benefit3: Annual learning budget (₩2,000,000) for conferences, courses, and certifications
careers.benefit4: Health insurance and annual health check-up coverage
careers.applyEmail: Send your resume and a brief note about why you are interested to careers@petitstay.com. We review every application and aim to respond within five business days.

press.title: Press
press.subtitle: News and media resources.
press.news1Title: Petit Stay Begins Premium Hotel Pilot in Seoul
press.news1Desc: In-hotel childcare platform Petit Stay launches its pilot program with select five-star hotels in Gangnam and Jongno, offering on-demand vetted specialist matching for hotel guests. March 1, 2026.
press.news2Title: Petit Stay Selected for Startup Accelerator Program
press.news2Desc: Petit Stay has been selected for a government-backed startup support program recognizing its innovative approach to hotel childcare through B2B2C platform technology. February 15, 2026.
press.mediaKitDesc: For logos, brand guidelines, and high-resolution images, please contact our communications team at press@petitstay.com.
press.inquiriesDesc: Journalists and media professionals can reach us at press@petitstay.com. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and support.
help.a1: Hotels partner with Petit Stay to offer on-demand childcare. As a hotel guest, you can book through the hotel concierge desk or directly via the Petit Stay app. Once confirmed, a vetted specialist arrives at the hotel, checks in via QR code with the front desk, and you can monitor the entire session in real time through the app — including activity logs and photo updates.
help.a2: Every specialist goes through a multi-step verification process: government-issued ID verification, criminal background check, child abuse registry screening, valid first-aid and CPR certification, and completion of our proprietary hospitality training program. Specialists must maintain their certifications to remain active on the platform.
help.a3: We support children aged 3 to 8. This age range allows our specialists to provide focused, age-appropriate care including creative play, reading, and light outdoor activities within the hotel premises.
help.a4: Yes. Every booking automatically includes comprehensive liability insurance (up to ₩100,000,000 per incident) covering both the child and the specialist for the full duration of the session. No additional purchase is required.
help.a5: Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the scheduled start time. Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the session incur a 50% fee. No-shows are charged the full booking amount.
help.a6: The platform interface is available in English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese. Specialists are matched based on language preferences whenever possible, and many of our specialists are bilingual or trilingual.
help.a7: Standard rates start at ₩60,000 per hour. The price includes the specialist fee, platform fee, and insurance coverage. Final pricing is displayed before you confirm the booking. Hotels may offer bundled packages or promotional rates for their guests.
help.q8: How are specialists matched to my booking?
help.a8: Our matching algorithm considers language preferences, children's ages, specialist certifications and specialties, availability, past ratings from other families, and proximity to the hotel. You can also request a specific specialist you have worked with before.
help.a9: Every specialist is first-aid and CPR certified. In a medical emergency, the specialist immediately contacts emergency services (119), notifies parents via the app with real-time updates, and alerts the hotel front desk. Our 24/7 operations team is simultaneously notified and coordinates support until the situation is resolved.
help.q10: Can I use Petit Stay at any hotel?
help.a10: Petit Stay is currently available at partner hotels in Seoul. We are preparing to expand to Tokyo. If your hotel is not yet in our network, you can suggest that your hotel contact us at partners@petitstay.com to join.
help.contactDesc: Could not find what you were looking for? Reach out to our support team at support@petitstay.com or use the in-app chat feature. We are available 24/7 during active sessions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly when creating an account or making a booking: name, email address, phone number, and payment details. For child safety matching, we collect children's age and any special care requirements. During sessions, we collect activity logs and photos shared by specialists. We also collect device information and usage data for platform security and improvement.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to: process and manage bookings between families, hotels, and specialists; verify specialist qualifications and conduct background checks; send booking confirmations, real-time session updates, and safety notifications; match specialists based on language, age group, and availability; process payments and issue receipts; improve our services through aggregated, anonymized analytics; and comply with legal obligations under Korean law.
privacy.section3Content: We share relevant booking details with hotel partners and assigned specialists solely to facilitate the requested service. We do not sell personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers who assist in platform operations: payment processors (PG companies), cloud hosting (Google Cloud/Firebase), and background check agencies. All third-party processors are contractually bound to handle data in accordance with PIPA.
privacy.section4Content: All personal data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Access to personal data is restricted by role-based access controls and requires multi-factor authentication. We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments. Session monitoring data (activity logs, photos) is encrypted and stored separately from personally identifiable information.
privacy.section5Content: Account information is retained for the duration of your membership and for 1 year after account deletion, as required by the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce. Children's personal data (age, special care notes, session photos) is automatically deleted 90 days after the session ends. Payment records are retained for 5 years in accordance with tax law requirements.
privacy.section6Content: Under the Personal Information Protection Act, you have the right to: access your personal data and request copies (Article 35); correct inaccurate information (Article 36); request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention requirements (Article 36); suspend processing of your personal data (Article 37); and withdraw consent at any time (Article 38). To exercise these rights, contact privacy@petitstay.com. We will respond within 10 business days as required by law.
privacy.section7Content: We use essential cookies to maintain sessions and preferences. Analytics cookies are used only with your explicit consent and can be disabled in your browser settings. We do not use third-party advertising trackers.
privacy.section8Content: For privacy-related inquiries, data access requests, or complaints, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@petitstay.com or by mail at: Petit Stay Inc., Gangnam-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea. If you are unsatisfied with our response, you may file a complaint with the Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC) at www.pipc.go.kr.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The agreement between you and Petit Stay.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using the Petit Stay platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Petit Stay Inc., a company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Korea.
terms.section2Content: Petit Stay provides a technology platform connecting hotel partners with vetted childcare specialists on behalf of guest families. We facilitate specialist matching, bookings, real-time session monitoring, and payment processing. Petit Stay is a platform operator, not a childcare provider. The childcare service is provided directly by independent specialists.
terms.section3Content: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your credentials and for all activity under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.
terms.section4Content: Bookings are confirmed once a specialist accepts and the hotel approves. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the scheduled session start time. Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the session incur a 50% cancellation fee. No-shows are charged the full booking amount. Petit Stay reserves the right to cancel any booking for safety reasons, in which case a full refund will be issued.
terms.section5Content: Full payment is required at the time of booking confirmation. Pricing displayed at booking time includes the specialist fee, platform fee, and applicable taxes (VAT). Payments are processed securely through licensed Korean PG (Payment Gateway) partners. Refunds for eligible cancellations are processed within 7 business days to the original payment method.
terms.section6Content: Petit Stay performs background checks, certification verification, and hospitality training for all specialists. However, we do not guarantee absolute safety. Parents are responsible for providing accurate information about their children's health conditions, allergies, and special needs. Any misrepresentation may void insurance coverage.
terms.section7Content: Every session is covered by comprehensive liability insurance (up to ₩100,000,000 per incident). Petit Stay's total liability for any claim arising from platform use shall not exceed the amount paid for the relevant booking. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Insurance claims must be filed within 30 days of the incident.
terms.section8Content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court. Before filing a lawsuit, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation for at least 30 days.
terms.section9Content: We may modify these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

solutions.hotelSubtitle: Offer premium in-room childcare as a hotel amenity. Zero risk, zero overhead — just happier families.
solutions.hotelPainSubtitle: Family travelers need care solutions, but hotels lack the infrastructure.
solutions.hotelPain1Desc: Recommending unvetted sitters exposes your hotel to legal and reputational risk. Our Trust Protocol and insurance coverage eliminate this entirely.
solutions.hotelPain2Desc: Your front desk spends hours coordinating childcare requests. Petit Stay automates the entire process from booking to payment.
solutions.hotelPain3Desc: Family travelers represent 35% of luxury hotel guests. Without childcare, you lose F&B revenue when parents stay in their rooms.
solutions.hotelFeat1Desc: View, create, and manage all childcare bookings from a centralized dashboard.
solutions.hotelFeat2Desc: Real-time session tracking with activity logs, photos, and instant alerts.
solutions.hotelFeat3Desc: Automated commission reports and monthly settlement statements.
solutions.hotelFeat4Desc: Response within 2 hours, 99.5% fulfillment rate, 24/7 ops support.
solutions.hotelPricingHint: Commission-based pricing — no upfront cost. Hotels earn a revenue share on every booking.
solutions.hotelCtaTitle: Ready to partner with Petit Stay?
solutions.hotelCtaSubtitle: Join our growing network of premium hotels offering trusted childcare.
solutions.famTitle: Enjoy Your Trip. We'll Take Care of the Rest.
solutions.famSubtitle: Trusted, hotel-verified childcare specialists so you can make the most of every moment.
solutions.famTrust1Desc: Every specialist passes background checks, certification verification, and ongoing reviews.
solutions.famTrust2Desc: Activity logs, photo updates, and instant chat keep you connected wherever you are.
solutions.famTrust3Desc: Every session is backed by comprehensive liability insurance for complete peace of mind.
solutions.famTrust4Desc: Our platform and specialists support English, Korean, Japanese, and Chinese.
solutions.famSceneSubtitle: Whether it's a romantic dinner or a business meeting, we've got you covered.
solutions.famScene1Desc: Enjoy a romantic evening out while your children are safe and entertained in your hotel room.
solutions.famScene2Desc: Explore the city, visit attractions, or go on adventures without worrying about the kids.
solutions.famScene3Desc: Attend conferences or meetings knowing your children are in professional care.
solutions.famStep1Desc: Select your preferred date, time, and specialist through our app.
solutions.famStep2Desc: Complete our quick safety protocol with medical info and emergency contacts.
solutions.famStep3Desc: Get real-time updates while you enjoy your evening. It's that simple.
solutions.famCtaTitle: Ready to enjoy your next trip?
solutions.famCtaSubtitle: Sign up and book your first session in minutes.
solutions.specTitle: A Rewarding Career in Premium Childcare
solutions.specSubtitle: Join our network of elite childcare professionals working with the world's best hotels.
solutions.specBenefit1Desc: Earn your way to Gold tier with premium rates, priority bookings, and exclusive hotel partnerships.
solutions.specBenefit2Desc: Earn ₩60,000–₩90,000 per hour with transparent weekly settlements. Top earners exceed ₩3M monthly.
solutions.specBenefit3Desc: Set your own availability. Work evenings, weekends, or whenever suits your lifestyle.
solutions.specBenefit4Desc: Access ongoing training, certifications, and career development opportunities.
solutions.specEarningsSubtitle: Competitive rates that reflect your expertise and dedication.
solutions.specReqSubtitle: We maintain high standards to ensure the best care for families.
solutions.specReq1Desc: Valid childcare certifications (e.g. CPR, First Aid, Early Childhood Education).
solutions.specReq2Desc: Minimum 2 years of professional childcare experience with verifiable references.
solutions.specReq3Desc: Proficiency in at least 2 languages (English required, Korean/Japanese/Chinese preferred).
solutions.specCtaSubtitle: Apply today and start earning as a Petit Stay specialist.

onboarding.quizDesc: Answer the following questions about childcare protocols. You need 80% or higher to pass.

onboarding.pendingDesc: Your application has been submitted and is being reviewed by our team. We will notify you once a decision has been made. Thank you for your patience.
onboarding.quizQ1: What should you do first when arriving at a guest room for a childcare session?
onboarding.quizQ1A: Immediately start playing with the child
onboarding.quizQ1B: Verify identity using the safe word and complete the room safety checklist
onboarding.quizQ1C: Wait for the parent to leave
onboarding.quizQ2: If a child shows signs of an allergic reaction, what is the correct first step?
onboarding.quizQ2A: Check the child's allergy card, administer prescribed medication if available, and contact emergency services
onboarding.quizQ2B: Give the child water and wait
onboarding.quizQ2D: Take the child to the hotel lobby
onboarding.quizQ3: How often should activity updates be logged during a session?
onboarding.quizQ3A: Only at the end of the session
onboarding.quizQ3C: Every 30 minutes or after each significant activity
onboarding.quizQ4: What is the correct procedure for child handoff at check-out?
onboarding.quizQ4A: Leave the child with the front desk
onboarding.quizQ4D: Verify parent identity, complete the check-out checklist, and obtain both signatures
onboarding.quizQ5: When should you report an incident to the Petit Stay operations team?
onboarding.quizQ5B: Immediately for any safety concern, injury, illness, or property damage
onboarding.quizQ5C: At the end of the session
